stories.title: Verstappen Retirement/Sabbatical Speculation Intensifies — Contract Clause Details Revealed

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
Max Verstappen has called the 2026 F1 formula "terrible" and "fundamentally flawed."

Reports say Red Bull is discussing ABANDONING the RB22 entirely.

And a sabbatical is being discussed. At 28. One of the greatest ever.

#F1Fanrecap #F1 #Verstappen

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Verstappen's contract reportedly has an exit clause.

He's been out-qualified by his rookie teammate. He hates the rules.

The 4-time world champion is at the "beginning of the period" that decides his future.

This is not a drill. 👀

#F1Fanrecap #F1

article.headline: Verstappen Retirement Speculation Grows as Red Bull Reportedly Debates Scrapping the RB22

image_concepts.label: Image
image_concepts.raw:
Verstappen Retirement/Sabbatical Speculation

**Social Image (1080×1350, 4:5 vertical)**
- **Visual Description:** Max Verstappen in helmet or Red Bull uniform, ideally conveying frustration or contemplation.
- **Photo Search Terms:**
  1. "Max Verstappen Red Bull"
  2. "Verstappen Red Bull Racing"
- **Text Overlay:**
  - Headline (Bebas Neue, white): "AT A CROSSROADS"
  - Subtitle (Montserrat, #FF5722): "'TERRIBLE.' 'FUNDAMENTALLY FLAWED.'"
  - Subtext (Montserrat, white): "Verstappen's future — and Red Bull's car — in question."
- **Overlay Bar:** Dark Midnight (#1A1A2E, 45% opacity) bottom third

**Article Hero (1200×630, landscape)**
- Same search terms, wider crop — helmet or cockpit shot preferred

---

research.facts:
Verstappen / Red Bull Crisis
| Fact | Confidence | Source |
|------|------------|--------|
| Verstappen called 2026 formula "terrible" and "fundamentally flawed" | HIGH | ESPN, GPFans |
| Reports of Red Bull discussing abandoning RB22 | MEDIUM | F1 Oversteer |
| Verstappen contract exit clause details now public | MEDIUM | Sportbible, Newsweek, Sportsnaut |
| Exit clause: if not at least 2nd by end of July, can terminate | MEDIUM | Multiple outlets (but Marko said changed/removed) |
| Verstappen at "beginning of the period" deciding his future | HIGH | GPFans |
| Sabbatical being discussed | MEDIUM | GPFans, Sportbible |
| Hadjar has out-qualified Verstappen multiple times | HIGH | Prior pipeline (established) |
NOTE: Exit clause status is contested — Marko said it was changed/removed. Use "reportedly" qualifier. RB22 abandonment is MEDIUM — from F1 Oversteer. The sabbatical angle is MEDIUM. Use careful language throughout.

stories.title: FIA April 9 Summit — Two Days Away, Unanimous Agreement Required

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
The FIA's emergency summit on 2026 F1 rules is TWO DAYS AWAY.

6 proposed fixes. Unanimous agreement needed. Goal: implement before Miami.

Super clipping. Energy limits. No more aero zones.

Can they agree? The whole sport is watching. 👀

#F1Fanrecap #F1

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
April 9. FIA summit. Every F1 team and PU maker at the table.

They need ALL 10 teams to agree. All 10.

If they don't? Miami gets the same energy chaos that crashed Bearman at 50G in Japan.

No pressure. 😬

#F1Fanrecap #F1

article.headline: Two Days to Fix F1: Inside the April 9 Summit That Could Save the 2026 Season

research.facts:
FIA April 9 Summit
| Fact | Confidence | Source |
|------|------------|--------|
| Summit is April 9, 2 days away | HIGH | Multiple outlets |
| Unanimous team agreement required | HIGH | Multiple outlets |
| Six fixes on table | HIGH | The Race, Scuderia Fans, Sportsnaut |
| Super clipping: 250kW→350kW proposed | HIGH | Multiple outlets |
| Energy limit: 9MJ→6MJ proposed (new detail, earlier said 7MJ) | MEDIUM | Formula 1 (sportsnaut), Scuderia Fans |
| Remove aero zones entirely proposed | HIGH | Multiple outlets |
| Goal: implement before Miami May 3 | HIGH | Multiple outlets |
| Peter Bayer presiding | HIGH | Prior pipeline |
| Bearman 50G crash triggered by energy disparity | HIGH | Multiple outlets |
NOTE: Energy limit figure varies: some sources say 9→7MJ, others say 9→6MJ. Use "as low as 6MJ per lap" or "6-7MJ per lap" to be accurate.

stories.title: Antonelli First Italian Back-to-Back F1 Winner Since Ascari 1953

x_posts.label: Post 3-1
x_posts.text:
Kimi Antonelli became the first Italian to win back-to-back F1 races since Alberto Ascari in 1953.

That's 73 years.

He's 19. He leads the championship. He broke Hamilton's record as the youngest title leader.

Italian motorsport is having a moment. 🇮🇹

#F1Fanrecap #F1

x_posts.label: Post 3-2
x_posts.text:
Antonelli: youngest F1 championship leader in history.

73 points. 9 ahead of Russell. Only Italian back-to-back winner since Ascari.

And we have FIVE WEEKS before the next race. 

How does a 19-year-old carry that pressure? 👀

#F1Fanrecap #F1

article.headline: Antonelli Joins Ascari: First Italian Back-to-Back F1 Winner in 73 Years

stories.title: Verstappen to Race GT3 at Nurburgring Qualifiers April 18-19 During F1 Break

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
While F1 takes a 5-week break, Max Verstappen is NOT resting.

He'll race a Mercedes-AMG GT3 in Red Bull livery at the Nurburgring qualifiers on April 18-19.

Car number 3. "Verstappen Racing" banner.

The man just cannot stop. 🏎️

#F1Fanrecap #F1 #Verstappen

stories.title: Ferrari ADUO Power Unit Cleared for Canadian GP — Closing the 20-30bhp Gap

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Ferrari has been cleared by the FIA to introduce its ADUO power unit upgrade from the Canadian GP.

The gap to Mercedes: an estimated 20-30bhp.

Monza test April 22. Hamilton and Leclerc driving.

The Ferrari comeback bid starts here. 🔴

#F1Fanrecap #Ferrari #F1

stories.title: Bearman Penalty Point Watch — Miami Is His Zero-Margin Race

x_posts.label: Post 6
x_posts.text:
Oliver Bearman enters Miami with 10 penalty points.

Two more = automatic one-race ban.

The earliest his points expire: May 23 — AFTER Miami.

One incident. That's all it takes.

#F1Fanrecap #F1 #Haas
